g.text: Federation -- many subgraph teams, one client-facing schema
Gateway composes 4 team-owned subgraphs into 1 supergraph. One client query becomes 3 subgraph calls, stitched on shared @key.
shared @key("id") -- gateway joins User across subgraphs
Team-aligned ownership: each subgraph has its own owner, deploy pipeline, on-call.
Cost: gateway becomes a critical-path component -- its uptime caps the whole graph's uptime.
